CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK( Library_Item__r.Image_URL__c ), HYPERLINK("/"+ Id , IMAGE(Library_Item__r.Image_URL__c, "",(VALUE(LEFT(Library_Item__r.Image_Ratio__c, FIND("X", Library_Item__r.Image_Ratio__c) - 1)) * 0.5),(VALUE(RIGHT(Library_Item__r.Image_Ratio__c, LEN(Library_Item__r.Image_Ratio__c) - FIND("X", Library_Item__r.Image_Ratio__c)))* 0.5))), HYPERLINK("/"+ Id ,IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/NoPhotoEmail.png", "" , 75,75)) )
CustomField.label: List Image
